title: acer velutinum f. glabrescens
intro: Acer velutinum f. glabrescens, a variant of the European maple tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree known for its small leaves and smooth bark. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Acer velutinum f. glabrescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide antioxidant properties. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in tinctures or dried and used as a herbal supplement.
